prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: full-frame rear-depth cutout for a 16:9 Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style sample and defines paper fibers, ink restraint, mineral colors and cut-paper edge language
Primary request: a sparse silhouette of distant celadon mountain ridges and two soft cloud-paper shapes designed to sit behind a study-room lattice window; elements occupy mainly the upper-left and upper-middle, with generous empty area
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage, matte mulberry paper, delicate deckled edges
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for local removal
Constraints: background is one uniform #ff00ff with no gradients, texture, shadows, floor or reflections; no #ff00ff inside the artwork; no people, text, watermark, logo or border; crisp complete cutout
Avoid: photorealism, glossy 3D, dense scenery
